description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI build token. Define a single stage called build-ext. Add a build-build-php74 job in the build-ext stage that sets CI_IMAGE to registry.gitlab.com/rommon/docker/build, runs docker build --pull -t $CI_IMAGE:7.4 -t $CI_IMAGE:latest build-php74 and then docker push $CI_IMAGE. Add a build-build-php80 job in the same stage with CI_IMAGE set to the same registry path, runs docker build --pull -t $CI_IMAGE:8.0 build-php80 and docker push $CI_IMAGE:8.0. Add build-codeclimate and build-codeclimate-ts-php jobs, each setting CI_IMAGE to their respective registry paths (registry.gitlab.com/rommon/docker/codeclimate and registry.gitlab.com/rommon/docker/codeclimate-ts-php), building with docker build --pull -t $CI_IMAGE:latest <context> and pushing the image.
